name: CABER System Demolitions
description: A demolitions suite of thrown charges and area-denial mines.
effect: This system can be used to throw a Stone Grenade or deploy a Thumper Mine.

actions.name: Stone Grenade
actions.detail:
Deal 3 AP Kinetic to the target and 5 Explosive in Blast 1.
Affected characters may attempt a Hull Save to reduce the damage of either type by 2.

deployables.name: Thumper Mine
deployables.detail: Characters within Burst 2 of the mine cannot be Hidden until they move out of the affected area.

name: Targeting Reflex Wiring
effect: You can use Overwatch reactions on enemies that move through your Threat.

name: Retaliation System
effect: Gain the Blood for Blood reaction.

actions.name: Blood for Blood
actions.trigger: A character within the Threat of any of your weapons deals damage to you.
actions.detail: You may Skirmish against the triggering character.

name: Motor Override
effect: Gain the Motor Override Full Tech action.

actions.name: Motor Override
actions.detail: The target must pass a Hull Save. If it fails, it can only take movement toward you until it passes a Hull Save as a Full Action.

name: Reflex Shield
effect: Gain the Reflex Shield reaction. A character may only benefit from this system 1/Turn.

actions.name: Reflex Shield
actions.trigger: An ally within Sensors is about to take damage.
actions.detail: Grant the triggering ally Resistance to one damage type for the round. A character may only benefit from this system 1/Turn.

name: Hanaphu NHP
effect: Your mech gains the AI tag and the Xbalanque protocol.

actions.name: Xbalanque
actions.detail: Until the end of your next turn, Hanaphu takes control of a Superheavy Melee weapon equipped on your mech, giving it +2 Threat and Arcing. While Hanaphu has control you may not make other attacks with this weapon. Hanaphu makes one attack with it as a free action on your turn while this Protocol is active, and has Overwatch.

name: Static Net
effect: Gain the Static Net Quick Tech action.

actions.name: Static Net
actions.detail: Choose a point within Sensors: deployables in Blast 2 must pass a Tech Save or be Stunned until the end of your next turn.

name: SCREECHER Drone
effect: Deploy the SCREECHER to a free space within Sensors.

deployables.name: SCREECHER
deployables.detail: The SCREECHER produces a sonic and subsonic screech in Burst 1: it prevents any form of communication within the area and inflicts -2 to Tech and Hull Saves within Burst 1.

name: Shadow Network
effect: Gain the Shadow Network protocol.

actions.name: Shadow Network
actions.detail: All deployables you have active within Sensors become Invisible.

name: Self-Destruct Code
effect: Drones deployed by a mech with this system can be detonated as a Quick Tech action.

actions.name: Detonate Drone
actions.detail: A drone you have deployed detonates, dealing 1d6 AP Explosive in Burst 1, and is Destroyed.

name: Lift Drone
effect: Deploy the Lift Drone to grant temporary flight to an ally.

deployables.name: Lift Drone
deployables.detail: Grants temporary flight to an adjacent ally until the end of that ally's next turn.

name: Liquid Metal Subalterns
effect: As a Quick Tech, these subalterns can be deployed to a free space within Sensors.

actions.name: Attach
actions.detail: A Liquid Metal Subaltern attaches to a target, which must pass a Hull Save or become Slowed.

actions.name: Caltrop
actions.detail: A Liquid Metal Subaltern spreads into jagged forms, turning its space and adjacent spaces into Dangerous Terrain.

name: Cognition Riddle
effect: Gain the Cognition Riddle Full Tech action.

actions.name: Cognition Riddle
actions.detail: An enemy within Sensors must pass a Tech Save or be unable to target any deployables until the end of its next turn.

add_special.detail: You cannot target any deployables until the end of your next turn.

name: A.N.T. Subalterns
effect: Deploy drones within Sensors that burrow and become Hidden. As a Quick Tech, direct them to Tunnel, Sink, or Rearrange mines.

actions.name: Direct A.N.T.s
actions.detail: Direct the A.N.T. Subalterns to Tunnel, Sink, or Rearrange mines.

name: WEB Demolitions System
description: Entangling demolition charges in grenade and mine configurations.
effect: This system can be used to throw a WEB Grenade or deploy a WEB Mine.

actions.name: WEB Grenade
actions.detail:
Deal 3 Energy damage.
The target must pass a Hull Save or become Slowed.

deployables.name: WEB Mine
deployables.detail: The triggering character must pass a Hull Save or become Immobilized until it passes a Hull Save as a Full Action.

name: Heat Integrator
effect: Gain the Heat Integrator Quick Tech action.

actions.name: Heat Integrator
actions.detail: Make a tech attack against a target within Sensors. On a success, transfer 1 Heat from the target to the IKKI.

name: Entropic Shift System
effect: Gain the Entropic Shift reaction.

actions.name: Entropic Shift
actions.trigger: An opposed test is triggered within Sensors.
actions.detail: Switch the rolls of an ally and opponent in the opposed test. You must declare this reaction before the dice are rolled.

name: Pythagoras NHP
effect: Your mech gains the AI tag and the DYAD Full Tech action.

actions.name: DYAD
actions.detail: The Pythagoras NHP forces an enemy to face the concept of their other selves: their sensors read every enemy as a copy of themselves, causing them to gain +2 Difficulty on all hostile actions until the end of their next turn. Each enemy can only be affected by this effect once per scene.

name: Perimeter System
effect: Gain the Alarm Quick Tech action.

actions.name: Alarm
actions.detail: Make a tech attack. On a success, the target emits noise, making it impossible for it to become Hidden.

name: Capture Drone
effect: Deploy a Capture Drone as a Quick Tech. Gain the Seize Quick Tech action.

deployables.name: Capture Drone
deployables.detail: A drone built to latch onto and hold targets in place.

actions.name: Seize
actions.detail: Make a tech attack. On a success, the target cannot move out of adjacency with the Capture Drone. A Seized target can be dragged at half speed if the drone passes a Hull Save.

name: Interdiction
effect: Gain the Interdiction Full Tech action.

actions.name: Interdiction
actions.detail: The MEDJAY focuses on the sensors of comrades on the battlefield. Until the start of its next turn, while using a weapon with the Arcing tag, the MEDJAY can make Overwatch attacks using its allies' Threat.

name: Geometric Calculation Assist
effect: As a Quick Action, gain Aiming for weapons with the Arcing tag.

actions.name: Geometric Calculation Assist
actions.detail: Gain Aiming for weapons with the Arcing tag.

name: FEAR Module
effect: Gain the Dominance and Subversion Quick Tech actions.

actions.name: Dominance
actions.detail: Gain +1 Accuracy when attacking a character that is already suffering Difficulty on attacks.

actions.name: Subversion
actions.detail: Inflict +1 Difficulty on a character already suffering Difficulty, until the end of its next turn.

name: Redundant Utility Drone
effect: This drone can be used to restore a system the MARMETINE has lost due to Structure Damage. This does not return any Structure. The effect lasts for 1 Scene.
